## What Challenges Did You Face?

<!-- What was the hardest part? Where did you get stuck?
     Example: "I forgot that the modulo operator (%) returns the remainder.
     I initially used division instead. Reading the hints section helped me understand." -->

---

## What Did You Learn?

<!-- What is one new thing you learned from this challenge?
     Example: "I learned that 0 % 2 == 0, so zero is considered an even number.
     I also learned that negative numbers can be even or odd too." -->

## Test Results

**Did all tests pass?**

- [ ] Yes, all tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v` shows all PASSED)
- [ ] No, some tests are still failing (describe which ones below)

**If tests are failing, which ones and why?**

<!-- Paste the test output here if tests failed -->

## Self-Review Checklist

Before submitting, please confirm:

- [ ] I read the challenge README fully
- [ ] I wrote the solution myself (not copied from AI or another student)
- [ ] My code is inside `starter.py`
- [ ] I ran `pytest tests/ -v` and all tests pass
- [ ] My commit message is descriptive (not "done" or "asdf")
- [ ] I am opening this PR to the **company repository**, not my own fork
